---
name: keydeck-proof
description: USE FOR validating KeyDeck proof milestones against explicit acceptance checks. DO NOT USE FOR generic coding or unrelated architecture brainstorming.
---
# KeyDeck Proof Validator

## Use when
- A KeyDeck milestone has explicit acceptance checks.
- The task asks whether proof evidence supports a claim.

## Do not use when
- The user wants generic coding help.
- No proof contract or acceptance evidence exists.

## Procedure
1. Read the Task Contract.
2. Match each acceptance check to durable evidence.
3. Mark unsupported checks as unproven.
4. Never infer completion from confidence.
